creator: mauricio@arareko.net
text:
The error is because the setup.py script goes into interactive mode
asking to install some extra modules. I've created a extra patch for skipping
this and which installs everything as default, please use the
attachment as the definitive patch for the whole port.





Regards,


Mauricio.

 

--

MAURICIO HERRERA CUADRA

mauricio@arareko.net

http://www.arareko.net/

Subject: Re: ports/111817: [PATCH] biology/py-biopython: update to 1.43

build error. Could you fix this ?
